steps.name: Domain: resetSweep method on TripService
steps.criteria: TripService.resetSweep() sets all staple trip items back to needed=true and checked=false, clears all completed areas. One-off items are removed. Trip is ready for a fresh sweep.

steps.name: UI: Reset Sweep button on HomeView
steps.criteria: HomeView shows a 'Reset Sweep' button. Tapping it calls resetSweep, refreshes the view. All staples show as needed, no items checked, sweep progress reset to 0.
